title: Research with Prof. Xinggang Wang
subtitle: Adversarial ML research with Prof. Xinggang Wang
summary: A research-assistant period focused on adversarial robustness, interpretability, and what adversarial training changes inside a model.

blocks.text: This lab period deepened the adversarial-ML thread that began with the signature project. Much of the reading, experimentation, and writing around noise modulation came together here.

items: [Noise Modulation: Let your model interpret itself](https://arxiv.org/abs/2103.10603)
